title: Qatar Biomedical Research Institute (QBRI)
description: [AI generated] Qatar Biomedical Research Institute (QBRI) is a research institute based in Qatar, operating under Hamad Bin Khalifa University. It focuses on biomedical research in areas such as genomics, diabetes, cancer, and neurological disorders. QBRI aims to advance precision medicine and translational research to address health challenges prevalent in Qatar and the broader region, contributing to the country's science and innovation goals.
